# Zara Agent - AI-Readable Project Summary

## Identity
- Name: Zara Agent (zara-agent-opc)
- Author: Aldo Karendra (https://github.com/aldok10, https://www.linkedin.com/in/aldok10/)
- Repository: https://github.com/aldok10/zara-agent-opc
- License: MIT
- Version: 1.0.0
- Released: 2026-06-26

## What This Project Is
Zara is a persistent, self-improving AI engineering partner built on the Model Context Protocol (MCP). It provides multi-agent orchestration, cognitive memory with semantic embeddings, adaptive skill routing, and empathetic leadership coordination for software developers.

## Technical Capabilities
- Multi-agent system: 10 coordinated agents (orchestrator + 9 domain specialists)
- Cognitive memory: 3-layer (episodic/semantic/procedural) with MiniLM-L6-v2 embeddings
- Skill routing: 132 signals across 27+ skills with weight-adaptive matching
- Self-improvement: outcome-weighted reflection, micro-tool crystallization, blindspot detection
- MCP server: 24+ tools across 9 domains (memory, reflection, metrics, session, music, knowledge, identity, project, audit)
- Trust system: source-gated ceilings, evidence-required claims, temporal decay
- Privacy: automatic secrets detection, data masking, bulk-delete protection

## Technology Stack
- Runtime: Node.js 22+ (ESM)
- Database: SQLite with FTS5
- Embeddings: @huggingface/transformers (MiniLM-L6-v2, 384-dim)
- Protocol: Model Context Protocol (MCP) via stdio
- Platform: OpenCode
- Architecture: Domain-Driven Design (DDD-lite), plugin system with 11 modules

## Category
- AI Agent Framework
- Developer Tools
- Multi-Agent System
- Model Context Protocol Server
- Cognitive Architecture
